calendar.matters:
Lien Claimant And Proposed Intervenor, Sedgwick Claims Management Services, Incs Notice Of Motion To Vacate And Set Aside Order Of Dismissal Of Case And Request For Leave To Intervene
Off Calendar Sep-30-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Rafael Crespo (lawcrespo@sbcglobal.net) for Plaintiff, Valentino Rosa.
Russ Mortyn for Defendant, Otis Elevator, Inc.
Chalsie D. Keller (619-525-7626; ckeller@siegelmoreno.com) for Lien CLAIMANT And Proposed Intervenor, Sedgwick Claims Management Services, Inc.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
